message:
feat(replay): provenance emitter, decision trace, and audit trail (ft-og6q6.3.4)

ReplayProvenanceEmitter with configurable verbosity, FIFO eviction, JSONL export.
DecisionExplanationTrace with counterfactual mismatch detection.
ReplayAuditTrail with SHA-256 tamper-evident hash chain and gap detection.
34 unit tests + 23 property tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
